chunks.title: Catalog Description
chunks.content:
Special Topics in... Credit 0 to 4. Selected topics in an identified area of computer
science. May be repeated for credit. Prerequisite: Approval of instructor.

chunks.title: Additional Course Details
chunks.content:
Algorithms for control-flow prediction including conditional branch prediction, indirect branch
prediction, return address prediction, and branch target buffer management. Addressing
technological constraints for implementation of branch prediction algorithms.

chunks.title: Course Prerequisites
chunks.content: Prerequisite/Corequisite(s): Approval of instructor.

chunks.title: Course Learning Outcomes
chunks.content:
Upon completion of this course, the learner will be able to:
• Explain and compare modern control-flow prediction algorithms
• Implement branch prediction in a detailed microarchitectural simulator
• Optimize branch predictors for a given class of workloads

chunks.title: Special Course Designation
chunks.content: None

chunks.title: Textbook and/or Resource Materials
chunks.content: This material Is: Optional

chunks.title: Notes:
chunks.content: No textbook is required. Papers will be distributed as needed.

chunks.title: Grading Policy
chunks.content:
Letter grades will be assigned as follows: A is ≥ 90%; B is ≥ 80%; C is ≥ 70%; D is ≥
60%; F is < 60%.
• Presentations: (50% of grade).
• Project: (50% of grade)

chunks.title: Late Work Policy
chunks.content:
Work submitted by a student as makeup work for an excused absence is not
considered late work and is exempt from the late work policy (Student Rule 7).

chunks.title: Course Specific Late Work Policy
chunks.content: Late work is not accepted.

chunks.title: AI Statement
chunks.content:
If you use AI to complete any portion of an assignment, you must give a detailed
disclosure in the assignment writeup of how you used it.

chunks.title: Texas A&M College Station
chunks.content:
Students needing a listening ear can contact University Health Services at
979.458.4584. Call 911 or visit your nearest emergency room if you are currently
experiencing a life-threatening situation or if your safety is at risk. 24-hour
emergency help is also available through the 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline (988) or
at 988lifeline.org.
